message:
fix(runtime): Fail fast on stdlib put operations

Fixed silent data loss in Python stdlib hash map operations:

tkinter/widget.zig:
- Widget option storage now panics on OOM instead of silently losing options

profile/profile_class.zig:
- Profiler timing tracking now panics on OOM instead of silently losing timing data

pstats/stats.zig:
- Stats merging/stripping now panics on OOM instead of silently losing stats entries

sqlite3/types.zig:
- Type adapter/converter registration now panics on OOM instead of silently failing

contextvars.zig:
- Context copying now panics on OOM instead of silently losing context vars

modulefinder.zig:
- Module exclude/path/replacement tracking now panics on OOM instead of silently failing

gettext.zig:
- Locale directory binding now panics on OOM instead of silently failing

All changed from 'catch {}' to 'catch unreachable'.
